learning.description: Machine learning and pattern recognition platform

learning.step4Desc: Apply insights to improve future decisions
learning.title: Learning & Patterns
learning.llmTuningDescription: Export learning artifacts as training data for LLM fine-tuning. Each artifact is converted into a structured training record with decision context, suitable for instruction-tuning or conversation-format fine-tuning.
learning.llmExportNoteDesc: Each artifact generates one training record containing the artifact content, decision context, risk assessment, and COREVIA Brain analysis. Use JSONL format for OpenAI/DeepSeek fine-tuning, or Conversation format for chat model training.
learning.fineTuneDescription: Run LoRA fine-tuning on Engine A using your learning artifacts. The fine-tuned model is automatically registered in Ollama as "corevia-mistral-nemo" for sovereign inference.
learning.fineTuneNoteDesc: Your learning artifacts are converted to training data, then LoRA fine-tuning runs on GPU via Engine C. The fine-tuned model is converted to GGUF and pushed to Ollama, replacing the base model for future decisions.

dubaiByDesign.executiveSummary: Align your organization with Dubai's ambitious vision for excellence and innovation. Leverage frameworks from Dubai Government Excellence Program, Smart Dubai, and Dubai 10X to position your entity at the forefront of the emirate's digital transformation.

strategyLeadership.description: Evaluate strategic vision alignment, leadership digital fluency, and transformation roadmap maturity

peopleCulture.description: Assess workforce digital skills, change readiness, and innovation culture across the organization
peopleCulture.executiveSummary: Unlock your workforce potential through targeted capability assessments. Identify skill gaps, measure change readiness, and cultivate an innovation-driven culture that accelerates digital adoption and sustains competitive advantage.

processOperations.title: Process & Operations
processOperations.description: Measure process digitization levels, automation maturity, and operational excellence indicators
processOperations.executiveSummary: Optimize operational efficiency through process excellence frameworks. Evaluate automation maturity, identify bottlenecks, and implement lean practices that reduce costs while improving service delivery and quality outcomes.

technologyInfrastructure.title: Technology & Infrastructure
technologyInfrastructure.description: Evaluate IT modernization, cloud adoption, architecture flexibility, and technical debt levels
technologyInfrastructure.executiveSummary: Modernize your technology foundation with architecture assessments aligned to business goals. Evaluate cloud readiness, technical debt, and infrastructure scalability to build resilient, future-proof systems.

dataIntelligence.title: Data & Intelligence
dataIntelligence.description: Assess data governance maturity, analytics capabilities, and AI/ML readiness for insights
dataIntelligence.executiveSummary: Harness the power of data-driven decision making through comprehensive analytics assessments. Evaluate data governance, AI readiness, and analytical capabilities to transform raw data into strategic insights.

governanceSecurity.title: Governance & Security
governanceSecurity.description: Evaluate compliance posture, cybersecurity maturity, risk management, and regulatory alignment
governanceSecurity.executiveSummary: Strengthen your security posture with comprehensive governance assessments. Ensure regulatory compliance, evaluate cybersecurity maturity, and implement robust risk management frameworks aligned with international standards.
